subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qabli-Akbar! We have made mention of all who have turned towards Our Most Exalted Horizon with verses that no treasuries can equal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر انا ذکرنا کل من اقبل الی افقی الاعلی بایات لاتعادلها الخزائن
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
